scene: A horizontal, edge-to-edge {{material}} game tile spanning {{block_width}} cells wide by 1 cell tall, reading as one cohesive piece. A deeply carved {{centerpiece}} sits at the center as the dominant focal relief. {{flanking}} decorations extend symmetrically to both sides. {{filler}} details fill remaining space as border relief.

subjects.description: deeply carved, bold silhouette with {{inlay}}-lined engraved accents and clean readable contours; the single hero element of the block
subjects.size: large (about 50% of tile height, centered horizontally)
subjects.interaction: dominant focal symbol anchoring the entire horizontal block; flanking motifs flow outward from it

subjects.description: symmetrical decorative panels extending outward from the center toward both ends, with simplified readable details and subtle {{inlay}}-lined accents
subjects.position: left and right of center, extending toward tile edges
subjects.size: medium, filling the horizontal space between center and edges
subjects.interaction: creates visual flow from center outward; reinforces the block reads as one piece

subjects.description: repeating decorative shapes running as continuous bands along the top and bottom edges of the horizontal tile
subjects.position: upper edge band and lower edge band (full width)
subjects.interaction: unifies the horizontal span; frames the tile top and bottom

subjects.description: small reliefs and micro-engraved ornaments filling remaining negative space between the main elements
subjects.position: gaps between subjects and near edges
subjects.interaction: fills remaining surface while preserving readability of main icon

style: hand-painted cel-shaded game art; flat color fills with subtle bevel lighting; crisp icon readability
lighting: stylized top-left key light; gentle bevel highlights on upper-left edges; deeper shadows cast toward bottom-right within carved grooves; {{inlay}} inlay catches slightly brighter highlights
mood: ancient, bold, mystical, game-readable, premium artifact

background.details: no separate background layer; the entire canvas is the tile surface. All visible pixels belong to the {{material}} tile; no white border, no transparency, no backdrop.

composition: horizontally centered focus; {{centerpiece}} anchors the middle; decorative elements flow symmetrically left and right; the entire {{block_width}}:1 rectangle reads as a single unified block, not {{block_width}} separate tiles; designed for clean readability at 48px cell height

camera.focus: uniform sharp focus across full tile; crisp edges and outlines

medium: digital hand-painted illustration simulating carved {{material}} relief with {{inlay}}-lined inlay
resolution: {{block_width}}:1 horizontal rectangle (tile-asset ready, scales down cleanly to 48px cell height)
details: 2-3 tonal variations of the same hue family for carved depth
thin black outlines (2-3px equivalent) separating major shapes and element boundaries
flat fills with subtle bevel shading: lighter top-left, darker bottom-right
{{inlay}}-lined edges and details on the {{centerpiece}} and select engravings
the block must read as ONE cohesive horizontal piece, not {{block_width}} repeated squares
clean, bold, simplified shapes for legibility at small sizes
tile fills the entire {{block_width}}:1 canvas edge-to-edge with no padding
effects: edge-integrated surface vignette (tile-only shading, not background)
subtle ambient occlusion in deeper carvings
minimal specular glint on {{inlay}} inlay (controlled, not glossy)
usage_notes: Treat this as a single opaque tile asset: the canvas is fully covered by the {{material}} tile. The block is {{block_width}} cells wide displayed at ~48px per cell. Apply the vignette as a surface shading pass on the {{material}}, not as a background behind the tile. Preserve strong silhouettes and crisp 2-3px outlines. The design must NOT look like {{block_width}} identical tiles placed side by side - it must be one unified horizontal piece with a centered focal point.

tile_vignette.region: outermost 8-10% of the tile perimeter on all sides
tile_vignette.behavior: smooth, seamless darkening applied to the {{material}} texture itself (fully opaque), increasing toward the extreme edges
tile_vignette.color_method: darken/multiply the base {{material}} tones toward near-black at the extreme edge without introducing a separate black background layer
tile_vignette.notes: no visible background; no white or transparent margins; the vignette must not read as a backdrop

negative_prompt: {{block_width}} separate square tiles placed side by side

generation_hints.line_weight: 2-3px equivalent black outline between major shapes
generation_hints.edge_rule: the darkest pixels occur at the extreme perimeter but remain part of the {{material}} surface, not an external background
generation_hints.cohesion_rule: the centerpiece anchors the center; flanking decorations flow outward; the block reads as one piece
